MINI MINUTES:
Defendant's Motion To Compel The Continued Deposition Of Plaintiff Michael U. Rollins: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Motion is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to appear for his deposition in Room 612 on a date to be agreed upon by counsel and to be completed no later than October 19, 2009. Sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
